Pointing Masonry

average

04 01 30.60
Brick Washing
(0010) Acid cleanser, smooth brick
(0020) rough brick
(0030) Stone, acid wash
Minimum suggested crew size: one builder and laborer.

Notes:
1. A multiplier of 1.5 was used to convert civilian production rates to military production rates in this
figure. No further adjustment required for military production.
2. Scaffolding is not included.
3. Clean-up is included.
4. A person can clean 50 SF per hour on smooth brick and 35 SF per hour on rough brick. Do not
use acid solution until wall is at least 7 days old.
5. Recommend use of 1 gallon muriatic acid to 20 gallons of water for 1,000 SF.
